title: Painted spat

{{Quote|Imperial scientists have been unavailable for comment, but reports of mutations of other common species have been surfacing on Talus as well.|''[[Coronet Gossip]]''|<ref name="SWG:P18">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=other|Loading Screen: Publish 18}}</ref>}}
The '''painted spat''' was a subtype of [[carrion spat]], an [[Bird/Legends|avian]] creature native to the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].<ref name="SWG:TTE" /> A [[Mutant|mutated]] variant,<ref name="SWG:P18" /> this creature was larger, stronger and more resistant to average carrion spat. Somewhat similar in appearance to the [[carrion spat]]s of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], the painted spat differed: The coloration of the skin was much darker with pronounced horizontal stripes along the back; the bony structure protruding from the mandible was not, from appearance, a true beak (the jaw did not resemble a beak at all, rather, resembling a reptilian jaw).<ref name="SWG:TTE" />

==History==
The existence of the painted spat was first reported on [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:P18" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> adventurous [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] traveled to Talus in order to hunt painted spats. At least three of these animals were seen roughly 3,500 meters from [[Nashal Starport]].<ref name="SWG:TTE" /> Their large 'beaks' were sometimes used as trophies.<ref name="SWG:TTE" /><ref name="SWG:TC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Trophy Creatures}}</ref>

Painted spats were later spotted on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] as well. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the painted spat [[Gravefeather]] and its pack of enraged carrion spats attacked [[Farm/Legends|farms]] on the outskirts of [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]], such as [[Pol Handerin]]'s [[Pol Handerin's farm|farm]].<ref name="SWG:HFPH">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Help Farmer Pol Handerin|Corellia}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Painted spats appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TTE" /> prior to the [[Star Wars video games|game's]] closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Painted spats were added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 18 Notes for 15 Jun 2005|Publish 18]]," released on [[June 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 18.0">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=archive%202005#june|text=Publish 18.0}}</ref>
